calendar.matters:
Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee And To Serve Without Bond
Off Calendar Oct-30-2024 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee And To Serve Without Bond
Off Calendar Sep-04-2024 Continued To Oct-30-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Catherine Yee appeared by zoom for Edmond Lau (petitioner).

The court stated that there are no waivers of bond by Paul Lau and Martin Lau. Mrs. Yee stated that a previous petition was filed, that they had waivers filed in that case and that she has no problem with filing the waivers. Mrs. Yee also stated that the husband will not be claiming any interest and that the two sons are the only beneficiaries. The Petition to Appoint Successor Trustee and to Serve Without Bond is continued to October 30, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mrs. Yee is to file the waivers of bond by October 16, 2024.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
